sentence: 新闻自由是民主社会的重要基础之一。
pinyin: Xīnwén zìyóu shì mínzhǔ shèhuì de zhòngyào jīchǔ zhī yī.
english: Freedom of the press is one of the important foundations of a democratic society.

sentence: 他在当地一家报馆工作，负责采访新闻。
pinyin: Tā zài dāngdì yījiā bàoguǎn gōngzuò, fùzé cǎifǎng xīnwén.
english: He works at a local newspaper office, responsible for reporting the news.

meaning: 1. bronze medal; 2. bronze plaque bearing a business name or logo etc;
sentence: 她在这次比赛中赢得了铜牌。
pinyin: Tā zài zhè cì bǐsài zhōng yíngdé le tóngpái.
english: She won a bronze medal in this competition.

sentence: 浴室地板很光滑，走路要小心。
pinyin: Yùshì dìbǎn hěn guāng huá, zǒulù yào xiǎoxīn.
english: The bathroom floor is very slippery, so be careful walking on it.

sentence: 孩子伸手触摸了那朵花。
pinyin: Háizi shēn shǒu chùmō le nà duǒ huā.
english: The child reached out and touched that flower.
